lines.raw: Why is Joe's garden | 为什么乔的花园

lines.english: the most beautiful one in the town?
lines.raw: the most beautiful one in the town? | 是镇上最漂亮的一个？

lines.english: Joe Sanders has the most beautiful garden
lines.chinese: 乔·桑德斯拥有最美丽的花园
lines.raw: Joe Sanders has the most beautiful garden | 乔·桑德斯拥有最美丽的花园
in our town. | 在我们镇上。

lines.chinese: 几乎每个人都报名参加
lines.raw: Nearly everybody enters for | 几乎每个人都报名参加
'The Nicest Garden Competition' each year, | 每年的“最美花园竞赛”，
but Joe wins every time. | 但乔每次都赢。

lines.english: Bill Frith's garden is larger than Joe's.
lines.chinese: 比尔·弗里斯的花园比乔的花园大。
lines.raw: Bill Frith's garden is larger than Joe's. | 比尔·弗里斯的花园比乔的花园大。
Bill works harder than Joe | 比尔比乔更努力工作

lines.english: and grows more flowers and vegetables,
lines.chinese: 并且种植更多的花卉和蔬菜，
lines.raw: and grows more flowers and vegetables, | 并且种植更多的花卉和蔬菜，

lines.english: but Joe's garden is more interesting.
lines.raw: but Joe's garden is more interesting. | 但乔的花园更有趣。
He has made neat paths | 他修建了整齐的小径

lines.english: and has built a wooden bridge over a pool.
lines.chinese: 并在池塘上架起了一座木桥。
lines.raw: and has built a wooden bridge over a pool. | 并在池塘上架起了一座木桥。
I like gardens too, | 我也喜欢花园，

lines.english: but I do not like hard work.
lines.raw: but I do not like hard work. | 但我不喜欢辛苦劳作。

lines.english: I enter for the garden competition too,
lines.raw: I enter for the garden competition too, | 我也参加花园竞赛，

lines.english: and I always win a little prize
lines.raw: and I always win a little prize | 我总是赢得一个小奖

lines.english: for the worst garden in the town!
lines.chinese: 因为我是镇上最差的花园！
lines.raw: for the worst garden in the town! | 因为我是镇上最差的花园！
